projects.name: paintedd.art
projects.description: An artist's portfolio website built as art in itself.

detail.story: Full creative freedom — observe the artist, learn about them and their work, and create a website that reflects their unique style and personality. The site is ever evolving as living art does.
evolution: Initial brief: Linktree alternative on a custom domain
Added an events page to share upcoming shows and exhibitions
Designed a pipeline to auto-compress images into 3 tiers (thumbnail, medium, high-res) with burned-in watermarks
